steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “help those companies thrive” shows the exchange can support the growth of small firms.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Nurture means to foster growth or development, which aligns with helping companies thrive.
The other choices mean to label, to prevent, or to evaluate, none of which convey that supportive role.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
